they base their conclusions on the static, autogenerated nature of the files.\n   - No suspicious or malicious behavior is inferred without evidence.\n\n7. **Score Consistency:**\n   - The scores are consistent with the detailed reasoning provided.\n   - No adjustments are necessary.\n\n---\n\n### Final Expert Estimation:\n\n- **Malware Score:** 0 — The code is static, autogenerated, and contains no malicious payload.\n- **Obfuscated Score:** 0 — No obfuscation present; code is straightforward.\n- **Risk Score:** 0 — No security risks identified; files are benign build artifacts.\n\n### Summary:\nAll files are benign, autogenerated source map or declaration files with no security concerns.
